fixes.whatChanged: Threaded explicit stdin file lists through the scout entrypoint/backend so stdin-scoped runs now measure only the selected files, and added a regression test for that path.
fixes.notes: Also raises the stdin scanner buffer to 10MB so long file-list inputs do not truncate.

fixes.whatChanged: Aligned session-end permission-cache cleanup with the hashed filename scheme used by gogent-permission-gate and updated the cleanup regression test.
fixes.notes: This preserves existing cache naming while finally removing stale cache files at session end.
